text:
Medicare Advantage plans records for medical supplies.

This file includes (variable highlights):
Part C Benefit Package and Contract number
Diagnosis (ICD diagnosis)
HCPCS code
Organization NPI
NPI for line supplier
Date of service (line date)
Special considerations:
Many Medicare Advantage Plans offer extra coverage in addition to services covered under traditional fee-for-service Medicare (e.g., vision, hearing, dental, and/or health and wellness programs). Encounter data may include records
